files.00_Overview.md: Good coverage but mixing Thai and English creates inconsistency. Consolidate sections 1-7 into clearer categories: Arithmetic Operations (merge content from 01_Introduction.md), Calculus Operations, Implicit/Explicit, Interpolation, Flux, Statistics, Boundary Operations. Add missing Learning Objectives section and Key Takeaways summary box.
files.01_Introduction.md: Heavily redundant with 00_Overview.md sections 1-5. All content (What is Field Algebra, Operation Types, fvc vs fvm, Key Operations, Building Equations) is duplicated. This file should be MERGED into 00_Overview.md or completely rewritten to focus solely on motivation and learning roadmap without technical details.
files.02_Arithmetic_Operations.md: Redundant with 00_Overview.md section 1. Merge unique content (component access, tensor operations, statistics with gSum vs sum) into 00_Overview.md. Add missing OpenFOAM Context callout boxes explaining domain connections to transportProperties and field initialization.
files.03_Operator_Overloading.md: Content overlaps with 02_Arithmetic_Operations.md. Distinctive content (comparison operators pos/neg, boundary assignment == operator, assignment operators += -= *= /=) should be preserved and expanded with more examples. Missing Learning Objectives and domain context.
files.04_Dimensional_Checking.md: Strong content with excellent OpenFOAM Context integration. Minor improvement needed: consolidate Debug Messages section with more practical error message examples from real solver logs. Add Learning Objectives box.
files.05_Expression_Templates.md: Content is too brief and lacks practical depth. Expand tmp Pattern section with lifecycle diagram. Add more anti-patterns examples. Missing Learning Objectives. Add connection to solver performance and memory profiling.
files.06_Common_Pitfalls.md: Good troubleshooting table format. Expand each pitfall with real error message examples from solver logs. Add prevention strategies checklist. Missing Learning Objectives section.
files.07_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Strong exercises with excellent OpenFOAM Context boxes. Exercise 1 code snippet has dimension mismatch error (volScalarField sum = p + T). Add progressive difficulty marking to exercises. Missing final Key Takeaways box summarizing entire module.

global_strategy: CRITICAL REDUNDANCE ISSUE: 01_Introduction.md duplicates 75% of 00_Overview.md. Merge 01_Introduction into 00_Overview, then delete 01_Introduction.md. Apply 3W Framework consistently: add Learning Objectives (What will you learn?) to every file, ensure motivation (Why it matters) with Thai TIP boxes, and practical code examples (How to apply). Standardize OpenFOAM Context callout boxes format across all files. Add Key Takeaways summary boxes to Overview and Summary files.
